system.flavor: You soar into the air with explosive pizzaz, leaving your enemies scorched.
system.effect:
Area Effect [X]: Explode for a burst 1 (self) area effect. Characters and summons caught inside other than you are pushed 1 space, and characters take 2 damage. Then you may fly 1d6 spaces.
Reckless flight and damage by +2, and gain haste.
